---
title: "Untitled"
editor: visual
---

```{r echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE}
library(htmltools)
library(tippy)

tooltip_text <- "This is an accessible tooltip."
accessible_tooltip <- paste0('<span aria-label="', tooltip_text, '">Accessible Tooltip</span>')
tippy(accessible_tooltip, tooltip = tooltip_text)
```
